evidence: The Company continues to integrate artificial intelligence (AI), including generative AI, into its business operations and products and research further uses and opportunities for AI development.
the development of adequate AI technology will require significant investment.
a failure to timely and effectively use AI and embed it into new product offerings and services that negatively impacts our competitiveness
The Company continues to integrate artificial intelligence (AI), including generative AI, into its business operations and products and research further uses and opportunities for AI development.
Delays or disruptions in successfully developing and implementing AI as part of the Company s business activities, products or services could have a negative impact on the Company s competitiveness

The premature use of inadequate AI or the use of deficient AI, including flawed or biased algorithms, could harm the Company s brand, reputation or competitive advantage or result in regulatory penalties or legal liability.
The input of confidential information or trade secrets into AI systems may result in the loss of intellectual property, proprietary rights or attorney-client privilege.
Failures in AI functionality could result in delays in new product offerings and services and have an adverse impact on other business activities.

limitations: No quantified AI investment amounts, headcount, or program budgets appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named integration activities and acknowledgment of significant investment required, without dollar figures.
AI narrative concreteness is low: excerpts describe integration in general terms with no named AI products, deployed features, or metrics — language is largely aspirational and risk-oriented.
Risk disclosure scored 4 (company-specific scenarios with mechanisms) rather than 5 because no quantified risk figures or named governance/oversight bodies appear in the excerpts.
Excerpts are pre-filtered; additional AI use-case or investment detail may exist elsewhere in the filing but is not visible here.
